_note: Constants marked 'assumed' are literature-seeded placeholders. Replace with field-fit values from controlled observations.

xpCostBase_meta.citation: Confirmed from aintegrity-squad-optimiser calibration (K=47, CV=3.2% across 5 observations). Structural constant — exponential cost shape is domain-agnostic.

xpCostDecayK_meta.citation: Confirmed CV 3.2% across 5 observations in source domain. Transfer assumption: exponential cost shape is domain-agnostic. Recalibrate once field maintenance data is available.

baseXpPerSession_meta.citation: Placeholder — must be back-calculated from first controlled field maintenance observations (before/after metric readings for known intervention count).

sessionBudgetDecay_meta.citation: Geometric decay confirmed in source domain (×114 session run, error -1 OVR). Decay constant 0.99 may differ for logistics interventions — recalibrate from repeated-intervention field data.

greyWeightMultiplier_meta.citation: Placeholder — secondary metric cost penalty. Calibrate from operational data by comparing primary vs secondary metric gain rates under identical intervention budgets.

maxBaseOvr_meta.citation: Placeholder ceiling — replace with domain-specific CeilingRule[] entries (Phase B Problem 3). This scalar will be deprecated once CeilingRule is active.

ageTable_meta.citation: Placeholder maturity table keyed by lifecycle stage index. Calibrate from field operational data comparing intervention effectiveness across asset age cohorts.

talentMultipliers_meta.citation: Placeholder efficiency classes replacing football talent tiers. Calibrate from asset specification data and observed intervention response rates.
